metadata.description: Agent skills for search, RAG, and document parsing with Mixedbread.

plugins.name: mxbai-cli
plugins.description: Manage stores, upload files, search, and sync documents using the mxbai CLI tool.

plugins.name: mixedbread-search
plugins.description: Build and query managed search indexes (Stores) using the Mixedbread Python and TypeScript SDKs.

plugins.name: mixedbread-parsing
plugins.description: Parse documents, extract structured content, and run OCR using the Mixedbread Parsing API.
